description_long: This is a modern, rectangular office desk with a dark wood grain finish and a slightly curved front edge for ergonomic comfort. The desk features a spacious tabletop supported by two sturdy side panels, with the right side incorporating a set of three vertically stacked drawers, each with a metallic handle. On the left side, there is an open cubby space suitable for storing a computer tower or books, and a modesty panel runs along the back for structural support. A pull-out keyboard tray is mounted beneath the main surface, supported by metal brackets. The overall design is functional and professional, suitable for work or study environments. The desk's clean lines and practical storage options make it ideal for urban office or home office settings.
description: A dark wood grain office desk with three drawers, an open cubby, and a pull-out keyboard tray. The design is modern, functional, and suitable for professional or home office use.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the broad desktop, left open cubby, and right side drawers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the desk's depth, curved front edge, and the modesty panel beneath the tabletop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the three drawers on the right, open cubby on the left, and the pull-out keyboard tray.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the desk's solid side panel and the subtle curve of the desktop.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the three drawers and open cubby, with the curved edge of the desktop intended to face the user for ergonomic access.
